case_title: ANDREA M CHOPP VS. BRIAN LEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-21-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEREMY POTTER--PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND CROSS--DEFENDANT'S REPRESNTATIVE WAIVED SERVICE IN COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO COSTS ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO VACATE HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, BRIAN HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOPP, ANDREA M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, BRIAN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (F)& (G). COURT FINDS DEFENDANT ACTED IN BAD FAITH & AWARDS STATUTORY DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
THE MOTION TO VACATE OF SEP-23-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR-DUPLICATE ENTRY

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY BRIAN LEE ON SEP-23-2015 - DENIED. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PLAINTIFF AND CROSS--DEFENDANT'S REPRESNTATIVE WAIVED SERVICE IN COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO COSTS ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEE, BRIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHOPP, ANDREA M DEFENDANT MAY NOT ASSERT A CLAIM AGAINST PLAINTIFF OR HER SECURITY DEPOSIT FOR ORDINARY WEAR AND TEAR OR PRE-EXISTING DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, BRIAN
